name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Beat the peanut butter, sugar, and eggs in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
3. Reserve 1 cup of the peanut butter mixture and set aside.
4. Melt 4 squares of chocolate and add it to the peanut butter mixture in the bowl. Mix well.
5. Press the mixture into an ungreased 13 x 9 inch pan.
6. Top with the reserved peanut butter mixture.
7. Bake for 30 minutes or until edges are lightly browned.
8. Melt the remaining 4 squares of chocolate and spread it evenly over the entire surface.
9. Sprinkle with peanuts.
10. Cool in the pan until the chocolate is set, then cut into bars.
